title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird founded Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform for AI tools, and raised $26M by betting on advertising as the primary business model for AI applications. The video discusses his decision-making framework from competitive sailing, why subscriptions have failed for AI apps, and identifies human trust adoption rather than technology as the bottleneck for AI agents.
